eligible_applicant_type: K-12 teachers of public and private schools
project_area: School and community garden projects focused on plant science education, including outdoor gardens, in-class plant science activities, hydroponics, vertical greenhouses, irrigation systems, nutrition education, and food preparation with fresh produce.
demographic_requirements: Projects must target students, especially those in urban areas, with a primary goal of increasing understanding and appreciation of agriculture through hands-on gardening and classroom activities.
eligibility_summary: Open to K-12 teachers, nonprofit organizations, and private institutions with plant science education as a primary goal. Projects must align with Common Core, Environmental Literacy, and NGSS standards and involve youth participation.
